resources.string: Pick which WebView implementation this app uses
No supported WebView implementations found. Please install one in the Downloader tab.
The current WebView implementation is not supported. Please select or install another one.
Force-enable ignore-gpu-blocklist and WebViewSurfaceControl on the chosen WebView
Restart required to apply the new WebView
Select another WebView implementation to stop the crashes

Changing the WebView implementation can fix features that don\'t work properly in Webmini — such as the copy button and microphone access — and can drastically improve the app\'s overall performance.\n\nThorium WebView is strongly recommended, especially on Huawei devices.

This app has a hidden Settings menu where you can switch to a faster WebView (Thorium is recommended), enable desktop mode, optimize performance and more.\n\nOpen it any time from the floating button at the top-right of the main screen, or from Android\'s App info → gear icon.
Check GitHub for a newer version of the app
Allow installs from this app to continue
